title: Version 0.4.143: UI improvements and individual upload stats

requirements.text: Add individual file upload progress statistics during multi-file uploads in the current upload area, displaying stats for each file being uploaded

quotes: Individual file upload stats: Display stats for each file during upload to better track progress
just add stats for individual files - also when uploading don't block usage of the File/Folder upload/create buttons!

acceptanceCriteria: During multi-file uploads, each file shows its own upload progress statistics
Upload stats are displayed in the current upload area without blocking the UI
Upload Files, New Folder, and Upload Folder buttons remain usable during active uploads

requirements.text: Merge the two view toggle buttons (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/button[1] and /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/button[2]) into a single button that toggles between list and grid views

quotes: keep only one toogle view button
there should be just one button which will represent both views - will toogle between them

acceptanceCriteria: Only one view toggle button is visible in the UI
The button switches between list and grid views on click
The button's appearance reflects the current view mode

requirements.text: Add a tooltip to the single view toggle button that displays on mouse hover

quotes: keep only one toogle view button and add to it tooltip
Add tooltips to the single toggle view button

acceptanceCriteria: The view toggle button displays a tooltip on hover
The tooltip clearly indicates the button's function

requirements.text: Truncate long filenames in the Name column cells to maintain consistent cell dimensions, ensuring the cell width and height do not change

quotes: Truncate long filenames: Keep consistent cell sizes while preserving the full name in tooltips
just truncate the long filename in the cell (not to change the width or hight)

acceptanceCriteria: Long filenames are visually truncated in the Name column cells
Cell dimensions remain fixed and do not expand for long filenames
Truncation is applied consistently across all filename displays in the table

requirements.text: Add tooltips to filenames in the Name column that display the full filename on mouse hover

quotes: if anyone wants to see full name will hoover over mouse and see tooltip with the name
show the full filename in tooltips on hover

acceptanceCriteria: Hovering over a filename displays a tooltip with the complete filename
Tooltip appears only on mouse hover over the filename
Tooltip is readable and clearly shows the full filename

requirements.text: Restore simple black/white button styling with subtle colored borders for Upload Files (blue border), New Folder (yellow border), and Upload Folder (yellow border) buttons as shown in image-167.png

quotes: Simplify button styling: Make Upload Files, Create Folder, and Upload Folder buttons less shiny with simple black/white styling and just a subtle colored border (blue for files, yellow for folders) - as are on the screenshot
I can see from image-167.png the target design - simple black/white buttons with subtle colored borders

acceptanceCriteria: Upload Files button has black/white styling with a subtle blue border
New Folder button has black/white styling with a subtle yellow border
Upload Folder button has black/white styling with a subtle yellow border
Button styling matches the design shown in image-167.png
Buttons are not shiny and have a clean, simple appearance

requirements.text: Add tooltips to action buttons (download, share/copy link, move, delete) that display on mouse hover

quotes: tooltips will have that button + action buttons
Add tooltips to the single toggle view button and action buttons (download/share/move/delete)

acceptanceCriteria: Download button displays a tooltip on hover
Share/copy link button displays a tooltip on hover
Move button displays a tooltip on hover
Delete button displays a tooltip on hover
Tooltips clearly describe each action

requirements.text: Do not add tooltips to Upload Files, New Folder, or Upload Folder buttons

quotes: no tooltip for Upload Files, New Folder and Upload Folder buttons

acceptanceCriteria: Upload Files button has no tooltip on hover
New Folder button has no tooltip on hover
Upload Folder button has no tooltip on hover

requirements.text: Update the application version to 0.4.143 in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts
acceptanceCriteria: The appVersion.ts file exports version string '0.4.143'
The version is displayed correctly in the footer

constraints: Do not move any UI elements to different positions
Do not change names of buttons or action buttons
Do not change alignments of action buttons
Do not modify the breadcrumb path component
Do not modify the search functionality
Preserve all existing functionality during the version update
nonGoals: Changing the overall layout or structure of the file manager
Adding new file operations beyond the specified UI improvements
Changing the authentication or access control system
Modifying the theme system or color scheme beyond the specified button styling
